summary: Iteration 163 — Security + Structure Pass testing complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All routes verified (/, /pastry, /pastry/admin, /pastry/gallery, /pastry/look/{token}, /beo, /beo/admin, /eng-ops/notifications). Sidebar reorganized with 8 groups, Culinary first.
critical_code_review_comments: Sentry backend init (no-op when SENTRY_DSN unset) — logs 'Sentry DSN not set — skipping init' ✓
slowapi rate-limiter installed with 429 JSON handler — limiter wired to app.state, exception handler registered ✓
Sidebar reorganized: 8 groups (Culinary, Quick Daily, Intelligence & Forecasting, Events & Catering, Financial & Procurement, Hotel Operations, Guest & Concierge, Admin & System) ✓
Culinary group is FIRST/topmost in sidebar ✓
No duplicate entries for Menu Engineering, FOH, IRD & Minibar, Inventory ✓
Each top-level group in sidebar is collapsible/expandable ✓
DeveloperSettings.tsx EchoCoder login now calls /api/admin/echocoder/verify with X-Admin-Token header ✓
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter163 delivered: (1) Sentry backend init in /app/backend/observability/sentry_init.py — no-op when SENTRY_DSN unset, logs 'Sentry DSN not set — skipping init'. (2) slowapi rate-limiter in /app/backend/observability/rate_limit.py with 429 JSON handler, applied as decorators to /api/cake-ai/photoreal/render (10/hour), /api/pastry/checkout/session (20/hour), /api/pastry/look/approve (30/hour). (3) EchoCoder back-office gate at /api/admin/echocoder/verify requires valid X-Admin-Token header (returns 401 without token, 200 with {ok:true,grant:echocoder} with valid token). (4) Sidebar reorganized in /app/client/components/site/Sidebar.tsx — 8 groups (down from 10), Culinary first, deduped Menu Engineering/FOH/IRD/Inventory, split Guest into its own group, merged Spa+Engineering into Hotel Ops, removed Community as top-level group. ROLE_SIDEBAR_ACCESS updated to use new group IDs. All endpoints tested and working.

backend_new: Sentry init no-op when SENTRY_DSN unset ✓
